CheckTitle: Ensure agent identities reference an existing blueprint
Description: Checks that every agent identity whose agentIdentityBlueprintId is set refers to a blueprint that still exists in the tenant. Agents whose parent blueprint has been deleted are orphaned and escape the governance and inheritable-permission restrictions the blueprint would enforce.
Risk: An orphaned agent no longer inherits the guardrails (inheritable permission restrictions, ownership, lifecycle) defined by its blueprint. It can persist unmanaged after the blueprint is retired, becoming a forgotten identity with standing permissions.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review the orphaned agent. Either recreate or reassign an appropriate blueprint, or disable and delete the agent if it is no longer needed.

SourceNotes: Only evaluated when at least one blueprint was collected, to avoid false positives when blueprint enumeration was skipped or unauthorized.
